assembly_context.name: 4Axis_Robotic_Arm_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 生成一个包含底座、3个中间臂段和1个带夹爪顶臂的4轴机械臂装配体。底座为长方体加圆台接口；臂段由两端方块（60x60x60mm）和中间圆柱组成，通过侧面销孔配合实现竖直转动；底座与第一臂通过中心轴孔配合实现水平转动。所有方块棱边倒角C2。交付SolidWorks零件及装配文件。
design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for modeling API.
Chamfer C2 on all cube edges of arm segments.
Clearance fit assumed for pin/hole interfaces (nominal size used for geometry).
Gripper fingers are modeled in half-open state.
assembly_sequence: Insert base_plate and fix to GROUND.
Mate arm_segment_2.bottom_side_face coincident with arm_segment_1.top_pin_face (or appropriate offset).

part.name: Arm Segment 1
part.function: First moving link, rotates horizontally around Base.
part.shape: Two 60x60x60mm cubes connected by a Φ40x150mm cylinder. Bottom cube has a central Φ40 through-hole. Top cube has a side Φ10x15mm pin protruding from one face. All cube edges chamfered C2.
part.material_or_notes: Aluminum. Pin is integral part of the top cube face.

axes.name: central_hole_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Z, centered in bottom cube

axes.name: pin_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local X, offset from center

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom hole concentric with Base main_axis_z.
Bottom face coincident with Base boss_top_face.
Pin axis will mate with Arm 2 bottom hole.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Cut central hole Dia 40 through Z.
Extrude connector cylinder Dia 40, length 150 along +Y (or chosen longitudinal axis).
Create top cube 60x60x60 at end of cylinder.
Add Chamfer C2 to all cube edges.
On one side face of top cube (e.g., +X), extrude pin Dia 10, length 15.
